subcodes.first_line: O Plato! They say that the divine Plato was of the people of illumination and the chief of the company of concord, if this be true [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فلاطون گویند فلاطون الهی از اهل اشراق بود و سر حلقه اهل وفاق اگر چنین است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @love and unity
